groups.title: Public RPC edge
groups.whyNeeded: Friends and family need a public HTTPS RPC endpoint that proxies to the private FlowChain origin without exposing local-only paths.
groups.ownerAction: Pick the public RPC URL, configure TLS termination, set exact HTTPS browser origins, and choose a positive per-minute rate limit.

groups.title: Backup storage
groups.whyNeeded: The public launch must prove the live state can be snapshotted, restored, and tamper-checked from persistent storage.
groups.ownerAction: Create an existing writable backup directory on the always-on host and point the owner env file at it.

groups.title: Tester write gateway
groups.whyNeeded: External testers need capped wallet create/faucet/send access without putting the raw bearer token in GitHub or chat.
groups.ownerAction: Keep tester writes enabled, store only the SHA-256 token digest in the ignored owner env file, and maintain a small per-send cap.
doNotSend: token hash together with the raw token

inputs.name: FLOWCHAIN_TESTER_WRITE_ENABLED
inputs.check: must equal true to expose the authenticated tester write gateway

inputs.name: FLOWCHAIN_TESTER_WRITE_TOKEN_SHA256
inputs.check: 64-character SHA-256 hex digest of the out-of-band tester bearer token

inputs.name: FLOWCHAIN_TESTER_MAX_SEND_UNITS
inputs.check: positive decimal integer test-unit cap per tester send

groups.title: Base 8453 bridge
groups.whyNeeded: Bridge-funded testing stays closed until the Base 8453 observer, lockbox, asset, block range, pilot caps, and confirmations are configured.
groups.ownerAction: Provide the Base RPC endpoint, lockbox and supported token addresses, asset decimals, start block, capped pilot acknowledgement, deposit cap, total cap, and confirmation depth.
doNotSend: provider API secret pasted in chat
